title: Evangelion shit on Yahoo Japan Auctions
display_title: Evangelion shit on Yahoo Japan Auctions
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion shit on Yahoo Japan Auctions             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Jul 19, 2012 5:27 pm Was taking a look at YJ today and found these 3: *Ritsuko and Maya film strip - from 2.22? http://page10.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/m103002477 *2 production cels from the Eva hentai video a while back (cels themselves are not H) Misato - http://page5.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/e128786897 Asuka - http://page10.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/m98481368

[]: Re: Evangelion shit on Yahoo Japan Auctions             Quote Post by PolarisX » Thu Jul 19, 2012 7:24 pm AR-99 wrote: Was taking a look at YJ today and found these 3: *Ritsuko and Maya film strip - from 2.22? http://page10.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/m103002477 *2 production cels from the Eva hentai video a while back (cels themselves are not H) Misato - http://page5.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/e128786897 Asuka - http://page10.auctions.yahoo.co.jp/jp/auction/m98481368

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Thu Jul 19, 2012 10:41 pm I think I actually know what scenes the 2 cels come from but can't find the video now. Ironically these are probably rarer than any of the production cels and much cheaper.
